title: Will Webuild remove the It Just So Happens part of NGE
display_title: Will Webuild remove the It Just So Happens part of NGE
wikitext:
[]: Will Webuild remove the 'It Just So Happens' part of NGE?             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Thu Jul 12, 2007 9:51 pm I was thinking about that scene where the transport aircraft for Sangoki (The unfortunate EVA-03, that is) tries to hurry to Japan and flies through a cumulonimbus cloud formation where that scum Bardiel happens to be hiding. Flash! Crackle! Bardiel's made himself home aboard the Eva, and takes control of it without anyone having any idea how he got on board, except for the viewer. All this would never have happened if the pilot had simply altered his flight path a little, and Bardiel would have probably come in after Zeruel struck, making him the 14th instead of the 13th. Similarly, how exactly does Ireul enter? Fuyutsuki and the bridge crew mention substandard construction and air bubbles, but why does Ireul come up when he does and then spread so fast? Is that junction between plates where he enters a crack? Same goes for Leliel, who is just...bizarre. Will Webuild decide to remove these 'it just so happens' sort of events and make it look like someone did something on purpose? Like Bardiel sneaking in inside a thunderstorm and arranging for a lightning strike to stick him to one of the Evas? Or Ireul sneaking in through a confirmed defect in construction? Zeruel having an anti-radar coating? That sort of stuff would add a lot of credibility, methinks.

[]: Re: Will Webuild remove the 'It Just So Happens' part of NGE             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jul 12, 2007 10:45 pm UrsusArctos wrote: Zeruel having an anti-radar coating?

[]: Re: Will Webuild remove the 'It Just So Happens' part of NGE             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Thu Jul 12, 2007 11:19 pm Similarly, how exactly does Ireul enter?

[]: Re: Will Webuild remove the 'It Just So Happens' part of NGE             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Jul 13, 2007 12:32 am CorporalChaos wrote: Leliel was just waiting there in embryonic form, then turned into the adult form. What suprises me is that no-one discovered it while they were building Tokyo-3.

[]: Re: Will Webuild remove the 'It Just So Happens' part of NGE             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Jul 13, 2007 12:51 am Reichu wrote: A.T. Field Voodoo.

[]: Re: Will Webuild remove the 'It Just So Happens' part of NGE             Quote Post by Ayana-Me » Fri Jul 13, 2007 12:51 am UrsusArctos wrote: Bardiel's made himself home aboard the Eva, and takes control of it without anyone having any idea how he got on board, except for the viewer.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Jul 13, 2007 12:53 am Maybe he's a symbiote, like Venom in Spider-Man 3? He starts off as a fungus, and then merges with the Eva, and by joining with it, he dies when the Eva dies (When Sho rips it apart). He mutates the arms as a convenience...but I guess they worked out the other way in the end.
